_meta.vesper_note: STUB. Vesper VesperParallaxAdapter submits this workflow + substitutes {{input_image}}, {{motion_mode}}, {{duration_s}}, {{output_fps}}, {{seed}}. The graph assumes a Depth Anything V2 node producing a depth map + a DepthFlow/ParallaxRender node consuming image + depth. The actual node names vary between repos — swap class_type strings to match your installed Depth Anything V2 + DepthFlow node pack. See docs/runbooks/vesper/vesper-server-bringup.md.

_meta.title: Depth map (swap class_type per installed pack)
Parallax render (swap class_type per installed pack)
Export MP4 (swap to your preferred VHS/Video Combine node)
